teamMembers.name: Michael Wing, DDS
teamMembers.title: Dentist
teamMembers.bio: Dr. Wing is a general dentist with 15 years of DFW experience, trained at Creighton University, fluent in English and Spanish, and focused on Invisalign, implants, and cosmetic dentistry.

testimonials.author: Phoenix T.
testimonials.text: Insane that I didn't know this was here. Mike was able to immediately find my issues, isolate them, and get me a plan going to not fix a cavity but to fix my smile.

testimonials.author: Itania B.
testimonials.text: A super experience. Dr. Wing explains each process, takes his time, and makes a clear priority plan.

testimonials.author: Site aggregate
testimonials.text: Patients describe personalized one-at-a-time appointments, clear explanations, and a welcoming environment.

rawPageText: Deep Ellum Advanced Dentistry in Dallas says 'a smile tells a thousand words' and offers full-service care for families under one roof. Core service categories include preventive, restorative, cosmetic, and emergency dentistry, with notable focus on Invisalign, implants, and smile makeovers. The office repeatedly emphasizes a welcoming and compassionate environment and asks patients to expect a memorable, enjoyable experience. New-patient copy states the first visit is the beginning of a long-term relationship and describes quality care, excellent customer service, and a relaxing environment. Dr. Michael Wing, DDS is highlighted as founder and lead dentist, fluent in English and Spanish, with 15 years practicing in DFW and ongoing implant-surgery teaching. Reviews mention personalized one-patient-at-a-time scheduling, clear explanation of treatment steps, and confidence-building smile plans. Contact details shown across pages: (214) 466-6610, mikewing@deepellumdentist.com, 3112 Main Street, Dallas, TX 75226. Hours shown: Tue/Fri/Sat 10:00 AM-5:00 PM, Mon/Wed/Thu/Sun closed.
